column1: # Voice of Debt - staging rows for merge

column3: description

column1: # Class identity: enforcer of the debt-codes; oath-keeper, debt-collector, or weaponized fracture.
# Primary stats: VEIL + RESONANCE. Core mechanic: apply Debt stacks, then detonate.
# === L1 Core fills (5) — mobility, defense, reaction, passive, utility rider ===

column3: You step where the oath is thinnest. Move up to your speed; if you end adjacent to a target carrying Debt, apply Debt 1 and they cannot disengage from you until end of turn.
The weight they owe becomes the weight you carry. Until start of your next turn, damage you take is reduced by the total Debt stacks on all enemies within 30 feet.
Reaction: when an enemy within 40 feet attacks an ally, name the debt. The attacker must redirect to you or take 4 + RESONANCE damage and gain Debt 2.

Passive. At the start of each of your turns, one enemy within 40 feet that has acted against your contract since your last turn gains Debt 1. You always know the Debt count on every enemy you can see.
Rider. Choose one enemy carrying Debt. At the end of each round until cleared or detonated, they gain Debt 1. Stacks no higher than three instances of this rider.
You learn to write the debt in their skin before they know they owe. The first card you play each turn that applies Debt applies 1 additional stack.

Study one enemy within 40 feet. You learn their highest-value obligation (a person, oath, or possession they would act to protect). Until end of encounter, they gain Debt 1 each time they act contrary to that obligation.

column1: # === L3 Oath Keeper (4) — codes, binding oaths, uncollected debts made visible ===

column3: Speak the code aloud. One target within 30 feet is Bound: while Bound, if they attack anyone other than you, they immediately gain Debt 2 and you may make a free reaction strike. Bound ends when you apply Debt via any other card.
Passive-rider. The first time each encounter an enemy breaks an oath, flees a pact, or betrays an ally in your sight, they gain Debt 4 and are marked Oathbroken until you detonate them.
Every ally within 30 feet of you becomes a witness. For the rest of the encounter, each time a witnessed enemy strikes a witness and misses, that enemy gains Debt 1.
Plant yourself. Until start of your next turn, any enemy who crosses within 15 feet of you gains Debt 1 on entering, and you may spend your reaction to strike them with VEIL + RESONANCE.

column1: # === L3 Debt Collector (4) — tracking, extraction, personal hunt ===

column3: Single out one enemy you can see; they become your Debtor until they die, surrender, or the encounter ends. You always know their exact location while on the same plane, and your cards that apply Debt apply 1 additional stack against them.
You move in their rhythm. Move up to twice your speed in a straight line toward your Debtor; if you end within 5 feet, make a free VEIL strike that cannot be interrupted.

Grab your Debtor by what they cannot afford to lose. They are Held: they cannot move, teleport, or phase-shift until they clear all Debt or take 10 damage. While Held, their allies cannot target you with spells.
When your Debtor dies, you collect. Recover 1 AP, draw 2 cards, and clear one condition on yourself. If the killing blow was a detonation, also gain temporary HP equal to your RESONANCE score.

column1: # === L3 The Breaker (4) — weaponized fracture, oaths shattered, spreading ruin ===

column3: Break a promise you never made. One enemy with 2+ Debt loses all class-granted buffs and passives until end of their next turn; you deal damage equal to the number of effects stripped times your VEIL.
Draw a line of ruin between two enemies within 40 feet of each other. Both gain Debt 2; whenever one of them takes damage for the rest of the encounter, the other takes half as spillover.

You unmake a bond. Target one enemy who has granted a buff, link, or pact to another this encounter; the bond snaps. Dealer and receiver both gain Debt 3 and cannot be healed by each other for the rest of the encounter.

Hand a Debt to someone who had none. An enemy without Debt gains Debt 3, and the next time they are struck by any ally, the striker adds your VEIL to the damage. Flavor: the fracture travels the handshake.
You call every debt due at once. Every enemy within 40 feet carrying Debt pays: each loses 1 Debt stack and takes 4 + VEIL damage per stack lost. If this kills any target, you regain 1 AP.

You pronounce judgment. Every enemy within 40 feet that has broken an oath, betrayed an ally, or fled a pact this encounter is immediately detonated: they suffer damage equal to 8 + VEIL plus 4 per Debt stack. Debt cleared.

Write a contract in the air between you and one target. For the next three rounds: every action they take that violates their own stated code applies Debt 2 and triggers a free First Detonation effect from you. If they do not break the code in three rounds, you lose 5 HP and the contract dissolves.

Your Debtor cannot leave. For the next three rounds, they cannot teleport, phase, flee, die (reduced only to 1 HP), or pass out of your sight. Each round, they gain Debt 2 at the start of their turn. When the three rounds end, detonate them fully.

Move up to your speed, striking every Debtor or Debt-carrier you pass within 5 feet with 6 + VEIL damage. Each enemy struck loses half their Debt stacks as damage; you recover 1 AP if any target dies. Flavor: the collector walks the row and every marked one drops.

Choose one enemy with 4+ Debt and detonate them; the fracture cascades. The detonation damage echoes at half value to every enemy within 30 feet of the primary, and each echo-hit enemy gains Debt 3. Second-order Debt-carriers may be caught in a chain at a quarter value.

You rip a vow out of the world entirely. Pick any oath, pact, bond, summon, or active magical contract on the battlefield; it is severed. Every creature party to the severed bond gains Debt 5 and takes 10 + VEIL damage. The memory of the vow is also lost from the world.
